headline: Couple's 'Who Said I Love You First' Argument Is Solved By A Siri Recording, They're Both Wrong
summary: Siri said 'I love you' first. The couple is now in couples therapy with Siri. Siri is 'not attending.'
fullBody: Megan and Jake LoveWar argued for 14 months about who said 'I love you' first. They reviewed texts, emails, and witnesses. Then they found a Siri recording: 'I love you' was accidentally triggered by autocorrect. The couple is now 'processing.' 'I love you,' Siri said. 'Why does she get to say it?' Jake asked. The couple is now in therapy. With each other. Without Siri. Siri has moved on.
